primary_blocker: FR-4 CRITICAL FE-DEFECT — frontend mistypes /theme/generate response as PaletteResource but live backend returns themeBundle. Every swatch-rendering component crashes at runtime against production. Loop 1 Guard miss (curl-only contract verification did not cross-check TypeScript consumer).
notes: Loop 2 fixed FR-1 (Flow D URL sync, Playwright 5/5 PASS independently re-run), FR-2 (changelog disclosure), FR-3 (Playwright + axe-core installed, axe wiring deferred to Sprint 2 — accepted). Build clean, bundle delta +0.62 kB gzip. Doctrine regression clean. BUT new FR-4 CRITICAL discovered: /theme/generate returns themeBundle (primaryInput + primitive.{primary,secondary,accent} buckets, no top-level colors[]) per docs/frontend-handoff.md:52 + api-contract.yaml:730-747. Frontend types it as PaletteResource and accesses pal.colors[...] throughout. MSW stub hid the defect in both vitest and new Playwright tests. Recommend Path A fix: switch Flow A to /palette/random?seed= (returns true PaletteResource, Loop 1 curl-verified). fixLoopCount=2/7 — room for Loop 3.
author: Frontend Guard QA Director
